DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_HOMEOWNERS_ASSOCIATION]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_HOMEOWNERS_ASSOCIATION]
( 
	[HOAID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[JobID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[HOAStatusID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AssignedToID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[HOAName] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[HOAPhone] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[HOAEmail] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[HOAAddress] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ARCFormSubmitted] [bit]  NULL,
	[SubmittedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[EnteredOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[UpdatedOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[LP_HOAID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_JobID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_HOAStatusID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_AssignedToID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
